---
title: "PlotsServer"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r cars}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
```

```{r}
numReads = 27000000
gridsearchDir = "../output/plotting_data/quality/dna/"
allGenesDir = "../output/all_gene_analysis/"
plotsDir = paste0(gridsearchDir, "plots/")
extType = ".jpg"
long_summary = read_tsv(paste0(gridsearchDir, "combined_comparison_summary_long.tsv")) %>% 
  filter(gene != "ENSSSCG00000044511" & mapping_reads != 0) 
long_summary = long_summary %>% mutate(not_recall = matched/mapping_reads, not_precision = matched/filtered_reads, percentReads = filtered_reads/numReads)

long_summary %>% select(mapping_reads, filtered_reads) %>% arrange((filtered_reads))
```


```{r}
plotMetric <- function(modeString, metric, func, 
                       save = F, 
                       df = long_summary, 
                       scaleFunc = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.0001)){
  metricString <- deparse(substitute(metric))
  funcString <- deparse(substitute(func))
  p = df %>% 
  filter(mode == modeString) %>% 
  group_by(k, threshold) %>% 
  mutate(summarisedMetric = func({{ metric }})) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(k),
             y = factor(threshold),
             fill = summarisedMetric)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(
  aes(label = scaleFunc(summarisedMetric)),
  size = 2)  +
    scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "#25ced1",
    high = "#ea526f",
    name =  metricString
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
    labs(title = paste(modeString, metricString, funcString)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
  if(save){
    filename = paste(sep = "_", metricString, modeString, funcString)
    pathname = paste0(plotsDir, "HeatMaps/", filename, extType)
    ggsave(pathname, p)
  }
  return(p)
}


```


```{r}
plotMetric("or", not_recall, min)
plotMetric("or", not_precision, min)

plotMetric("and", not_recall, min)

plotMetric("or", filtered_reads, max, F, 
                 df = long_summary %>% filter( k  > 10), 
                 scaleFunc = scales::label_number())




```


```{r}

plot_readCountByThreshold <- function(k_val, modeString) {
  offset_amount = 0.1
  plot_data <- long_summary %>% 
    filter(k == k_val)
  if(modeString != "both") {
    plot_data = plot_data %>% filter(mode == modeString)
  }
  
  # Calculate scale factor for secondary axis (using overall max values)
  max_filtered <- max(plot_data$filtered_reads, na.rm = TRUE)
  max_not_filtered <- max(plot_data$not_filtered, na.rm = TRUE)
  scale_factor <- max_filtered / max_not_filtered
  
  # Convert threshold to numeric and add offset for different point types
  plot_data <- plot_data %>%
    mutate(
      threshold_numeric = as.numeric(factor(threshold)),
      filtered_x = threshold_numeric - offset_amount/2,
      not_filtered_x = threshold_numeric + offset_amount/2
    )
  
  # Create the plot with threshold as factor but using numeric positions
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_point(data = plot_data,
               aes(x = filtered_x, 
                   y = filtered_reads, 
                   color = "Filtered Reads", 
                   group = gene),
               size = 1.5, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_point(data = plot_data,
               aes(x = not_filtered_x, 
                   y = not_filtered * scale_factor, 
                   color = "Not Filtered Reads", 
                   group = gene),
               size = 1.5, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      name = "Filtered Reads",
      sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / scale_factor, name = "Not Filtered Reads"),
      labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = unique(plot_data$threshold_numeric),
      labels = unique(plot_data$threshold),
      name = "Threshold"
    ) +
    labs(title = paste("Read Counts by Threshold ( k =", k_val, ", mode =",modeString,")"),
         color = "Read Type") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Filtered Reads" = "#25ced1", 
                                   "Not Filtered Reads" = "#ea526f")) 
  
  if(modeString == "both"){
    p = p + facet_wrap(~mode)
  }
  
  return(p)
}

saveReadCountsByThreshold <- function(modes = c("or", "and", "both")){
  for(k in unique(long_summary$k)) {
  for(mode in modes){
    p = plot_readCountByThreshold(k, mode)
    pathname=paste0(plotsDir, "ReadCountByThreshold/ReadCountByThreshold_K", k, "_", mode, extType)
    ggsave(pathname, p)
  }
}
}
```

```{r}
tsv = read_tsv(paste0(gridsearchDir, "k_17/offset_17/threshold_90/mode_and/read2gene_matrix.tsv"))
tsv %>% pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("E")) %>% group_by(name) %>% summarise(sum(value))

tsv %>% mutate(rowsum = rowSums(.[2:9])) %>% summarise(avg = mean(rowsum))
```


```{r}
#saveReadCountsByThreshold( c("both"))
#saveReadCountsByThreshold()

fullGenes = read_tsv(paste0(allGenesDir, "dna_gene_counts.tsv"))
fullRNA = read_tsv(paste0(allGenesDir, "gene_counts.tsv"))
parameterString="K=15, T=105"
```

```{r}

plotCountDistribution <- function(df, colour, typeString){
  p = df %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = count +1)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 100, fill = colour) +
  scale_x_log10(labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale()))+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = scales::cut_short_scale())) +
  labs(title = paste(typeString, "Count Distribution"),
       subtitle = paste0("(", parameterString, ")")) +
  theme_minimal()
  return(p)
}
```

```{r}
plotCountDistribution(fullGenes, "deepskyblue4", "Gene")
plotCountDistribution(fullRNA, "deepskyblue3", "Transcript")
```

```{r}
readVerbose <- function(path){
  tmp = read_delim(path, delim = ": ", 
                    col_names = c("cmd", "value")) %>% 
  mutate(cmd = str_replace_all(cmd, "([\n\t])", ""))
  return(tmp)
}

parse_elapsed <- function(x) {
  parts <- strsplit(x, ":")
  sapply(parts, function(p) {
    mins <- as.numeric(p[1])
    secs <- as.numeric(p[2])
    mins * 60 + secs
  })
}

getMaxResSize <- function(verboseDF){
  return(as.numeric((verboseDF %>% filter(cmd == "Maximum resident set size (kbytes)") )$value))
}

timingGenes = readVerbose(paste0(allGenesDir, "dna_verbose.txt"))
timingRNA = readVerbose(paste0(allGenesDir, "rna_verbose.txt"))


timingSummary = read_tsv(paste0(gridsearchDir, "time_summary.tsv"),
                         col_types = cols(elapsed = col_character())) %>% 
  mutate(mode = pair_mode,
         elapsed_sec = parse_elapsed(elapsed),
         max_rss_b = max_rss_kb * 1024) %>% 
  select(-pair_mode)




timingSummary %>%
  filter(pair_mode == "or") %>% 
  group_by(k, threshold) %>% 
  select(k, threshold, elapsed)

plotMetric("or", elapsed_sec, identity, df = timingSummary)
plotMetric("or", max_rss_b, identity, df = timingSummary, scaleFunc = scales::label_bytes(accuracy = 0.01))

```

```{r}
plotRunTimeFixedValue <- function(value1, metric1, xMetric, df = timingSummary, metric2=NA, value2=NA){
  xString = metricString <- deparse(substitute(xMetric))
  filterString = paste(deparse(substitute(metric1)), "=", value1)
  if(!is.na(value2)) 
    filterString = paste(filterString, "and", deparse(substitute(metric2)), "=", value2)

  
  df = df %>% 
    filter({{metric1}} == value1 &
             (if(!is.na(value2)) {{metric2}} == value2 else T)) %>% 
    mutate(linetype = mode, x = {{xMetric}}) %>%
    select(linetype, elapsed_sec, x) 
  
  x_breaks <- unique(df$x)
  
  p = df %>% 
    ggplot(aes(x = x, y = elapsed_sec, colour = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks =  x_breaks,  
      labels =  x_breaks
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = paste0("Program time for different ", xString, "s at: ", filterString),
         x = xString)
  
  return(p)
}

plotRunTimeFixedValue(15, k, threshold, metric2 = offset, value2 = 15)
plotRunTimeFixedValue(105, threshold, k)



```


```{r}

```
